# jellyfin_available_packages (Data Source)

Lists all packages available from the configured Jellyfin plugin repositories.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_available_packages" "all" {}

output "package_names" {
  value = [for p in data.jellyfin_available_packages.all.packages : p.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `packages` (Attributes List) The list of available packages. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--packages))

<a id="nestedatt--packages"></a>
### Nested Schema for `packages`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) The package description.
- `name` (String) The package name.
- `versions` (Attributes List) The list of available versions for the package. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--packages--versions))

<a id="nestedatt--packages--versions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `packages.versions`

Read-Only:

- `repository_name` (String) The repository name providing this version.
- `repository_url` (String) The repository URL providing this version.
- `target_abi` (String) The Jellyfin server ABI this version targets.
- `version` (String) The version string.
